caption:
Yelp is not your website.
They own that page. You just rent space on it.
A real website puts you in control of your leads, your look, and your Google ranking.

copy.myth: Yelp has me covered. I don't need a site.
copy.fact: Yelp owns that page. You own nothing there.
copy.body: Yelp can change your listing, bury it, or charge you more anytime. Your own website is real estate you control.
